basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Gopalganj Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for TGT and Librarian Posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: TGT (Computer Science): B.Sc/B.Tech (Computer Science)/BCA/ Bachelor of Information Technology OR Graduate Degree in any subject with Mathematics as a subject and 3 years Diploma in Computer Engineering/IT from any institution recognized by AICTE/University OR Graduate Degree in any subject with Mathematics as a subject and at least one year Diploma in Computer Application from an institution recognized by AICTE/University OR 'A' Level from DOEACC / NIELIT. AND Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) from an institution recognized by NCTE. Librarian: Graduate with degree in Library Science. OR Graduate with one-year diploma in Library Science from a recognized institution. Ability to converse fluently in English and Hindi.

salary_details.details: TGT (Computer Science): As per 7th CPC Level-7 (Basic Pay 44,900/-) Librarian: As per 7th CPC Level-7 (Basic Pay 44,900/-)

selection_process: Recruitment process (for Librarian) Selection purely on a merit basis
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Gopalganj Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ssgopalganj.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21 days from publication.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Sainik School Gopalganj Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sainik School Gopalganj Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Sainik School Gopalganj Recruitment 2026 is 21 days from the date of publication of the advertisement.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are TGT (Computer Science) and Librarian.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the TGT and Librarian posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 35 years for both TGT and Librarian posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for Gen/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for Gen/OBC candidates is Rs. 500.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST candidates is Rs. 400.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the prescribed application form along with required documents to the Principal, Sainik School Gopalganj.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is as per 7th CPC Level-7, with a basic pay of Rs. 44,900/-.

faq.question: Q8. What are the educational qualifications required for the TGT (Computer Science) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Sc/B.Tech (Computer Science)/BCA/Bachelor of Information Technology or equivalent, along with a B.Ed degree.

faq.question: Q9. What are the educational qualifications required for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduate degree in Library Science or a one-year diploma in Library Science from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the school's official website: www.ssgopalganj.in.

faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Sainik School Gopalganj Recruitment 2026 is 21 days from the date of publication of the advertisement.
